title: Thermal Power Plant Operation & Electrical Systems Study
tagline: Industrial study of power generation and electrical equipment at Harduaganj Thermal Power Station
description: Conducted an industrial study at Harduaganj Thermal Power Station (UPRVUNL), gaining practical knowledge of thermal power generation, transformers, generators, switchyard operations, electrical protection systems, and plant maintenance procedures.
highlights: Studied the complete thermal power generation cycle.
Observed the operation of generators, transformers, and switchyard equipment.
Learned industrial safety practices and preventive maintenance procedures.

title: Renewable Energy & Solar Power System Analysis
tagline: Industrial training focused on renewable energy integration and solar power generation
description: Worked on understanding renewable energy integration through GreenGenius Enviro Solutions and studied the operation of a 3 MW Solar Power Plant, including photovoltaic systems, grid integration, energy management, and power transmission.
highlights: Studied photovoltaic power generation and grid integration.
Analyzed renewable energy applications in modern power systems.
